title: centella macrocarpa var. macrocarpa
intro: Centella macrocarpa var. macrocarpa, also known as Gotu Kola, is a type of plant belonging to the waterwort family (Hydrocharitaceae) that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centella macrocarpa var. macrocarpa include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Centella macrocarpa var. macrocarpa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and topical creams, and is commonly consumed as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
